name: N. Corp - Regular check-up.
description:
"Pleased to meet you, hope you guess my name. But what's puzzling you is the nature of my game."

N. Corp has quite the impromptu group in their quest for the Golden Boughs. Despite that, it's better to make sure all of it's members are in top condition to face the sinners from Limbus Company, and other, lesser and poor souls that might cross their way on the opposite side.

Strongly advise using a proxy! This bot has many tokens, and the standard J.Ai might confuse definitions from all the characters and the informations about The City. Even with a decent proxy that might happen, but don't panic! Just reroll or edit the message to your own liking.

Ok we mostly see group bots about the sinners pov, so how about standing as their enemy for once?

Go on and try to destroy every single mirror world for once!

Ngl ya'll I'm running out of things to say in these descriptions, I need to lock-in!!

(edit: oops forgot the tags again, my bad gang)
creator: true_actual_villain
